# Asset & CDN workflow

## Why this folder exists

How catalog bytes, paths, and databases fit together — start at START-HERE.md.

## What is here

- START-HERE.md — reading order + dedup rules
- database.md — three DBs, verify commands
- backend.md, operations.md, site.md, planner.md, folders.md

## Rules

- DB topology only in database.md
- Upload commands only in operations.md
